~ Puneet

𝐅𝐈𝐍𝐀𝐋 𝐂𝐀𝐋𝐋: 𝐑𝐄𝐆𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐑𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍𝐒 𝐂𝐋𝐎𝐒𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐂𝐇 𝟏𝟖𝐭𝐡! The countdown for 𝐈𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐬 𝐀𝐧𝐝 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐬 (𝐈𝐧𝐂) 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔 has officially begun! This is your final opportunity to be part of the most prestigious international-level technical fest at Pune Institute of Computer Technology (PICT). With over ₹7,00,000+ in prizes and career-defining opportunities on the line, the clock is ticking! Registration Deadline: 𝟏𝟖𝐭𝐡 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐜𝐡 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔 Event Dates: 𝟐𝟕𝐭𝐡 – 𝟐𝟗𝐭𝐡 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐜𝐡 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔 OUR FLAGSHIP EVENTS 1. 𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐄𝐓𝐔𝐒 (𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝟏𝐬𝐭 – 𝟑𝐫𝐝 𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬) An International Project Exhibition & Competition designed for budding innovators. Domains: Application Development, ML & Pattern Recognition, Embedded Systems & VLSI, Communication Networks, Digital Image/Speech/Video Processing, and more. Team Size: 𝟏 - 𝟔 𝐌𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐑𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐅𝐞𝐞: ₹𝟏𝟎𝟎/- Contact Parth: +91 9699121723 2. 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐂𝐄𝐏𝐓𝐒 (𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐅𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐲)  The ultimate stage for BE students to showcase their final-year projects to an international jury. Domains: All major technical domains including App Dev, Security, and AI. Team Size:𝟏 - 𝟔 𝐌𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐬 Registration Fee: ₹𝟑𝟎𝟎/- Contact :Utsavi: +91 9423977466 3. 𝐏𝐑𝐀𝐃𝐍𝐘𝐀(𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝟏𝐬𝐭 – 𝟒𝐭𝐡 𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬) A high-intensity International Programming Contest for those who live and breathe code. Team Size: 𝟏 - 𝟐 𝐌𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐬 Registration Fee: ₹𝟏𝟎𝟎/- Contact Samarth: +91 7666631413 WHY SHOULD YOU REGISTER? 𝐌𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐳𝐞 𝐏𝐨𝐨𝐥: 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐚 𝐬𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐟 ₹𝟕,𝟎𝟎,𝟎𝟎𝟎+. 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐫 𝐋𝐚𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡𝐩𝐚𝐝: 𝐆𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐧-𝐭𝐡𝐞-𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐭 𝐣𝐨𝐛 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩 𝐨𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐮𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐭𝐨𝐩-𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐫 𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐫𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐬. 𝐆𝐥𝐨𝐛𝐚𝐥 𝐍𝐞𝐭𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠: 𝐒𝐡𝐨𝐰𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐲 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐩𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐬. S𝐄𝐂𝐔𝐑𝐄 𝐘𝐎𝐔𝐑 𝐒𝐏𝐎𝐓 𝐍𝐎𝐖 Official Website: pictinc.org Instagram Updates: @pict_inc_2026 Registration closes tomorrow, 18th March! Don’t let this opportunity pass you by.

TECH CARNIVAL 2K26
7/3/2026
~ vijay mohite
: Dear All, On behalf of the Computer Engineering Department, I extend my heartfelt thanks to all participants, faculty coordinators, student coordinators, student volunteers, and the institute management for your valuable contribution in making TECH-CARNIVAL 2K26 a grand success. The enthusiastic participation of students, the dedicated efforts of faculty members, the tireless support of student coordinators and volunteers, and the constant encouragement from the institute management played a vital role in the smooth planning and execution of the event. Organizing a State Level Technical Event with multiple competitions requires teamwork, commitment, and coordination. It is truly appreciable to see everyone come together with such energy and responsibility, which created a vibrant technical atmosphere and a memorable experience for all participants. Your support, cooperation, and hard work are highly appreciated and have greatly contributed to enhancing the reputation of our institute. Once again, thank you all for your sincere efforts and cooperation. Best Regards, Computer Engineering Department Zeal Polytechnic, Pune
